name: School Student Transportation
districts_or_customers: Cornwall-Lebanon SD, Northern Lebanon SD, and other Lebanon County PA districts; also operates as D.B. Fisher Charter Bus Co. / D.B. Fisher Tours & Travel Agency
recent_news: Long-standing Lebanon, PA family operator (founded 1966); records show continued active operations as of 2026 under D B Fisher School Student Transportation Inc. (DOT 966692) and affiliated D.B. Fisher Charter Bus Co.
fit_notes: Attractive PA tuck-in: ~200 employees, independent family-owned multi-district operator in Lebanon County with combined school/charter book and 60-yr operating history; Donnie Fisher's tenure suggests possible succession opportunity. Worth direct outreach.

name: Sunrise Busses Inc
principals: Christa Brown (Owner/CEO); Michelle Scheffler (daughter); Claire Martinez (granddaughter, Administration); Corinne Brown, Shannon Leonard, Gabriella Garren (family management)
districts_or_customers: Six North Fork / East End Long Island school districts; also operates several Suffolk County Transit routes; charter bus service. Sister to historic Sunrise Coach Lines (line-run/charter business sold to Hampton Jitney in 2006).
recent_news: Family-owned since 1937 (Brown family). 2006: sold line-run/charter operation to Hampton Jitney but retained school bus and transit operations. Christa Brown (82, widow of Robert W. Brown who died 2005) still owns and drives; 3rd/4th generation actively managing per 2024 greaterlongisland.com feature.
fit_notes: High-fit Long Island tuck-in candidate: aging 82-yr-old owner-operator, 4th-generation family business, six-district school book plus Suffolk transit. Strong succession signal; prior 2006 sale of charter segment to Hampton Jitney shows willingness to divest. Worth proactive outreach.

name: Beach Transportation
principals: Greg D. Beach (CEO); Scott R. Beach (COO); Loren Beach (Owner per ZoomInfo); Robert (Bob) Beach (prior gen); Ray Beach (founder); Carlin Cavill (GM); Robert Mitchell (GM historically)
districts_or_customers: Missoula County Public Schools (MCPS) primary contract; charter operations across MT/US/Canada including weddings, corporate, sports teams, conventions
recent_news: Family-owned since 1940 (Ray Beach -> Bob Beach -> sons Greg & Scott Beach, both joined 1979). 3-time Golden Merit Award recipient. Continues active as of 2025/2026 per Missoula Chamber and KPAX coverage.
fit_notes: Solid independent MT operator with anchor MCPS contract and large charter book; outside Summit's stated expansion footprint but valuable if MT is in scope. 3rd-generation principals (Greg/Scott Beach, both 45+ yrs tenure) suggest medium-term succession possibility; family pride/legacy may slow process.

name: Vantour
principals: Not publicly identified; address history at 1 Schevchenko Pl associated with Toby Weiser and Berish Weiser per OfficialUSA records (unverified linkage)
districts_or_customers: Likely serving Hasidic/Orthodox yeshivas and private schools in Rockland County / East Ramapo area; no public district contract list found
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Yelp listing active (updated 2025) at 72 Decatur Ave, Spring Valley. Affiliated entity Vantour 1 Inc at 1 Schevchenko Pl appears to be sister/operating company. Vantour of Rockland Inc also registered with NY corporations per Bizapedia.
fit_notes: Low-fit / low-confidence target. Spring Valley/Monsey yeshiva-transport ecosystem is dense with small van operators serving Orthodox private schools; not a typical public-district contract operator. Revenue/employee figures likely overstated. Deprioritize without further diligence.

name: Vantour 1 Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (likely affiliated with Vantour at 72 Decatur Ave, Spring Valley)
principals: Not publicly identified; Schevchenko Pl address historically associated with Toby Weiser and Berish Weiser (unverified)
districts_or_customers: Likely serving Hasidic/Orthodox yeshivas and private schools in Rockland County; no public district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Appears to be an affiliated/sister entity to Vantour (rank 376), sharing branding/phone pattern (845-578-1999 vs 845-425-1999). Operates from 1 Schevchenko Pl, Spring Valley.
fit_notes: Low-fit / low-confidence and likely double-counts with rank 376 Vantour. Same yeshiva-transport ecosystem in Spring Valley/Monsey; small van operator unlikely to be a Summit-scale public-district tuck-in. Deprioritize; consolidate with parent Vantour entity if pursued.
